title: Slow Your Roll: Totally Lit Compatibility
description: A mod adding compatibility between Slow Your Roll and Totally Lit.
body:
## Description
This is a small mod that bridges [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll) and [Totally Lit](https://modrinth.com/mod/totally-lit).  It adds an early-game fire creator that can be used to ignite unlit blocks, and some durablity-use crafting recipes for igniting unlit items.

### Features:
- Fire Starter item for early game fire making, crafted using 2 sticks and 4 of any tinder item (paper, wheat, short grass, any leaves, any saplings, string, any bark)
- Fire Starter has a configurable number of uses (default of 4, up to 64)
- Fire Starter is enchantable at an anvil, same as Flint and Steel
- Adds crafting recipe for igniting unlit Totally Lit items using Fire Starter or Flint and Steel
- In-game documentation is added to Slow Your Roll's Treatise category if [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) is installed
- In-game configuration is available via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed
- Requires [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll), [Totally Lit](https://modrinth.com/mod/totally-lit), and [Durability Damage Recipe](https://modrinth.com/mod/durabilitydamagerecipe) to be installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
